introText: Purebred Canadian Field line variety golden retrievers.
aboutUs:
We breed to CKC standards, and our puppies are family raised for pet homes. Our mama dogs are Bailey and Dakoda (Koda), and our stud Mr. Miagi (Miggy) lives with his own family.

Our puppies have early introduction to crate training, potty training, basic obedience, leash skills, sound desensitization, and a positive introduction to water. They come with their first round of shots, up-to-date deworming, a vet check, and a microchip.

I am a certified canine behaviorist specializing in behavior modification, which is what led me to breed balanced, family-friendly companions. Puppy owners have lifetime access to ask training-related questions.
